items.title: Slay the Spire 2 Releases in Early Access on March 5, 2026!
items.summary: Steam confirms Slay the Spire 2 arrives in Early Access on March 5, 2026 and links the official trailer and wishlist.

items.title: Slay the Spire 2 is out NOW in Early Access!!
items.summary: Launch post confirms Slay the Spire 2 is live on Steam Early Access; includes store link and studio thank-you.

items.title: The Neowsletter - March 2026
items.summary: March Neowsletter from Mega Crit thanks the community for launch response and highlights early reactions.

items.title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.99
items.summary: Patch v0.99 ships bug fixes, art additions, and a new max-HP cap; note the update is initially for select platforms.

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes - v0.98.1
items.summary: Day-one hotfix addresses reported issues and softlocks; players are encouraged to submit in-game feedback.

items.title: Reddit search — fetch error
items.summary: Scrape error: Reddit blocked access to the search RSS (HTTP 403).

items.summary: Mega Crit's original Slay the Spire 2 announcement post.
